name: audio-transcribe-summarize
description: Turn local audio/video (zh/en/mixed, any ffmpeg format, optional multi-file concat) into two Markdown files — a corrected transcript with speaker tags and a structured summary. Uses Xiaomi MiMo (mimo-v2.5 for ASR, mimo-v2.5-pro for revise & summarize) by default; DeepSeek is supported by model prefix. ~1.6 RMB for 8–10 hours of audio.
